org.springframework.data.relational.core.dialect.IdGeneration

Packages that use IdGeneration
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.relational.core.dialect
Dialects abstract the SQL dialect of the underlying database.

  • Uses of IdGeneration in org.springframework.data.relational.core.dialect

    Fields in org.springframework.data.relational.core.dialect declared as IdGeneration
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final IdGeneration
    IdGeneration.DEFAULT
    A default instance working for many databases and equivalent to Spring Data JDBCs behavior before version 2.1.

    Description
